SEARCH
Package org.atmosphere.cpr

Class Deliver

java.lang.Object
org.atmosphere.cpr.Deliver
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class Deliver extends Object implements Serializable
A Deliver is an Broadcaster's internal token that is created before the message gets Broadcaster. A Deliver gives information about what will be delivered, to whom, etc.
See Also:
